Josh Hudson
Work About Blog

Finally the pwa works on my android device, woohoo. Had to do some manifest.json tweaks but now I have a web app installed on my phone’s home screen that uses the login credentials and allows to to post thoughts remotely.

Next text is to go offline and use the app and see if it posts once back online.

Mar 25, 2026
Thought

The pwa works!!
